Every Pokémon TCG set

Complete card lists for all 178 English Pokémon sets — from Base Set (1999) through the newest Scarlet & Violet releases. Click any set to see every card, rarity and artist, or check values live in the TCG Companion app.

Affiliate disclosure: As an eBay Partner Network affiliate and a Vault X affiliate, TCG Companion earns from qualifying purchases. The price you pay doesn't change — full disclosure.

© 2026 Trading Card Apps Ltd. Pokémon and its trademarks are © of Nintendo, Game Freak and The Pokémon Company. Card images are used for editorial and identification purposes only.
